prompt:
{
  "type": "Japanese supermarket promotional flyer",
  "theme": "Spring festival, cherry blossom graphics, vibrant red and yellow color palette",
  "header": {
    "store_name": "{argument name=\"store name\" default=\"スーパー 架空\"}",
    "main_title": "{argument name=\"main headline\" default=\"週末大感謝祭\"}",
    "date": "{argument name=\"sale date\" default=\"4月19日 (日) 限定\"}",
    "badges": ["Point card 5x multiplier", "Spring flavor catchphrase"]
  },
  "layout": {
    "structure": "Grid with 12 product panels (3 rows by 4 columns) and a right-side vertical sidebar",
    "product_panels": {
      "count": 12,
      "items": [
        "Spring Cabbage with red price tag 158",
        "Bamboo Shoots with red price tag 198",
        "Strawberries with red price tag 598",
        "Sakura Mochi with red price tag 398",
        "Live Clams with red price tag 298",
        "Sea Bream Sashimi with red price tag 580",
        "Beef Shoulder Roast with red price tag 1280",
        "Spring Roll Ingredients with red price tag 780",
        "New Onions with red price tag 128",
        "Canola Flower with red price tag 198",
        "Pork Belly Slices with red price tag 228",
        "Sakura Manju with red price tag 168"
      ]
    },
    "sidebar": {
      "position": "right",
      "section_count": 4,
      "sections": [
        "Store address, phone number, and hours",
        "Green bulleted list of store features",
        "Small local map with parking info",
        "Green staff recruitment banner"
      ]
    },
    "footer": "Full-width red banner with white promotional text and fine print"
  }
}
translatedPrompt:
{
  "type": "日本超市促销传单",
  "theme": "春季庆典，樱花图案，鲜艳的红黄色调",
  "header": {
    "store_name": "{argument name=\"store name\" default=\"超市 架空\"}",
    "main_title": "{argument name=\"main headline\" default=\"周末大感谢祭\"}",
    "date": "{argument name=\"sale date\" default=\"4 月 19 日 (周日) 限定\"}",
    "badges": ["积分卡 5 倍积分", "春季风味宣传语"]
  },
  "layout": {
    "structure": "包含 12 个商品面板（3 行 4 列）的网格，以及右侧垂直侧边栏",
    "product_panels": {
      "count": 12,
      "items": [
        "春季卷心菜，红色价格标签 158",
        "竹笋，红色价格标签 198",
        "草莓，红色价格标签 598",
        "樱饼，红色价格标签 398",
        "活蛤蜊，红色价格标签 298",
        "鲷鱼刺身，红色价格标签 580",
        "牛肩肉，红色价格标签 1280",
        "春卷食材，红色价格标签 780",
        "新洋葱，红色价格标签 128",
        "油菜花，红色价格标签 198",
        "五花肉片，红色价格标签 228",
        "樱花馒头，红色价格标签 168"
      ]
    },
    "sidebar": {
      "position": "右侧",
      "section_count": 4,
      "sections": [
        "店铺地址、电话号码和营业时间",
        "绿色项目符号列表展示店铺特色",
        "带有停车信息的小型本地地图",
        "绿色员工招聘横幅"
      ]
    },
    "footer": "全宽红色横幅，配有白色促销文字和细则说明"
  }
}

breakdown.creativeCore: 日本超市春季促销传单：生成一份高度详细、逼真的日本超市促销传单，包含带有价格的季节性杂货商品网格。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.bestUse: 节日海报、城市印象、传统文化视觉、地域品牌

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: grid, vertical]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
